subject: LIGO/Virgo/KAGRA S241104a: Retraction of GW compact binary merger candidate
body:
The LIGO Scientific Collaboration, the Virgo Collaboration, and the KAGRA Collaboration report:

The trigger S241104a is no longer considered to be a candidate of interest. There were Data Quality issues in L1 with presence of a glitch. The detection pipeline and detector characterization experts recommended a retraction.
